label: Good
description: Minor wear and tear. No significant structural defects. Normal monitoring adequate.
requiredAction: Continue routine monitoring. Schedule next inspection per standard cycle.

label: Fair
description: Moderate deterioration. Some defects present but not immediately critical. Attention required.
requiredAction: Inspect within 2 years. Consider minor maintenance. Review restrictions.

label: Poor
description: Significant defects. Structural integrity attention required. Active management needed.
requiredAction: Inspect within 12 months. Plan maintenance. Review and update restrictions immediately.

label: Very Poor
description: Major defects. Urgent repairs required. Possible load restrictions warranted.
requiredAction: Immediate inspection required. Plan urgent maintenance. Apply load restrictions.

label: Critical
description: Imminent failure risk or structural failure possible. Immediate action required.
requiredAction: CLOSE BRIDGE TO TRAFFIC. Emergency inspection. Emergency maintenance. Notify TfNSW immediately.
